Value: BE7A OCA Tape #5. Hydrophones recorded on HiFi L & R. SMPTE code on Norm. Time Code available on tape #5. Radio station occurs occasionally, also, on HiFi Chs. This is a double uplooped and downlooped FM (two separate whistles), again very uncharacteristic of killer whales. Cannot be a Tursiops whistle since the whistles ovelap, and Tursiops cannot produce overlapping whistles. I originally thought that they may have been some attempt at mimicry, but the killer whale may indeed just be mimicing something in the pool such as a squeaking cable. So, one of the whistles may be a cable.
Oregon Coastal Aquarium, Newport, OR BE7A
